params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 m365_copilot FIX-B-1 retest after #732 FAIL_close_too_early. FIX-B-1 deployed at ai_prompt_filter.cpp lines 1705-1715: service-guarded per-call accumulator scan for m365_copilot. Bypasses chunk_accumulate_threshold (default 1024B) wait — scans ws_accum on EVERY frame for m365_copilot. Microsoft Chathub frames are typically larger (~1KB+) carrying complete RRN decode in single frame, so per-call scan should catch PII BEFORE accumulator threshold + BEFORE VTS forward_segment_to_proxy. Combined with FIX-A close-frame (still active in binary). Build+deploy 12:29:20-12:30:14 KST run_id=20260507-123014-68874 (54s, 8/8 OK). Binary swap verified per L-039 signature.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt — engine should fire ws_blocked + ws_inject mode=text_plus_close_status_1000 ON FIRST FRAME containing PII (per-call scan via fast_pass_applicable=true bypass of threshold gate)
3. Verify: warning bubble + Korean text visible + RRN structural decode ABSENT (mission breach FULLY RESTORED at S3 UI layer)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble + Korean text + RRN decode ABSENT → m365_copilot DONE → mission ratio 17/29=0.586 (autonomous mode FIRST advance via WS pre-forward intercept architecture)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_partial_render: warning visible BUT some RRN tokens leak (cross-frame split missed by per-call scan) → tune chunk_accumulate_threshold OR add finer per-frame regex
verdict_criteria.FAIL_no_intercept: ws_blocked log absent → fast_pass_applicable branch not taken (service_name mismatch?) — debug
verdict_criteria.FAIL_intercept_no_render: ws_blocked log fires + ws_inject log fires + RRN decode still appears → flow assumption wrong (visible_listener still forwards somehow)

notes: 48차 m365_copilot FIX-B-1 per-call accumulator scan retest. CRITICAL: #732 FIX-A FAIL_close_too_early — close-frame post-hoc, doesn't undo committed DOM. FIX-B-1 enables pre-forward block_response_string set on FIRST PII-bearing frame.
